{
    "cli": "quizcomp.cli.parse.quiz",
    "arguments": [
        "__DATA_DIR__(../../../testdata/quizzes/good/all-basic-questions/quiz.json)",
        "--format", "qti"
    ],
}
---
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<questestinterop xmlns="http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/ims_qtiasiv1p2" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemalocation="http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/ims_qtiasiv1p2 http://www.imsglobal.org/xsd/ims_qtiasiv1p2p1.xsd">
    <assessment ident="quiz" title="All Basic Questions">
        <qtimetadata>
            <qtimetadatafield>
                <fieldlabel>
                    cc_maxattempts
                </fieldlabel>
                <fieldentry>
                    1
                </fieldentry>
            </qtimetadatafield>
        </qtimetadata>
        <section ident="root_section">
            <section ident="group_0.0" title="essay-basic">
                <selection_ordering>
                    <selection>
                        <selection_number>
                            1
                        </selection_number>
                        <selection_extension>
                            <points_per_item>
                                0
                            </points_per_item>
                        </selection_extension>
                    </selection>
                </selection_ordering>
                <item ident="ef0.0.0" title="None">
                    <itemmetadata>
                        <qtimetadata>
                            <qtimetadatafield>
                                <fieldlabel>
                                    question_type
                                </fieldlabel>
                                <fieldentry>
                                </fieldentry>
                            </qtimetadatafield>
                            <qtimetadatafield>
                                <fieldlabel>
                                    points_possible
                                </fieldlabel>
                                <fieldentry>
                                    None
                                </fieldentry>
                            </qtimetadatafield>
                            <qtimetadatafield>
                                <fieldlabel>
                                    original_answer_ids
                                </fieldlabel>
                                <fieldentry>
                                </fieldentry>
                            </qtimetadatafield>
                            <qtimetadatafield>
                                <fieldlabel>
                                    assessment_identifierref
                                </fieldlabel>
                                <fieldentry>
                                    ef0.0.0
                                </fieldentry>
                            </qtimetadatafield>
                        </qtimetadata>
                    </itemmetadata>
                    <presentation>
                        <material>
                            <mattext texttype="text/html">
                            </mattext>
                        </material>
                        <response_str ident="response1" rcardinality="Single">
                            <render_fib>
                                <response_label ident="answer1" rshuffle="No">
                                </response_label>
                            </render_fib>
                        </response_str>
                    </presentation>
                    <resprocessing>
                        <outcomes>
                            <decvar maxvalue="100" minvalue="0" varname="SCORE" vartype="Decimal">
                            </decvar>
                        </outcomes>
                        <respcondition continue="Yes">
                            <conditionvar>
                                <other>
                                </other>
                            </conditionvar>
                            <displayfeedback feedbacktype="Response" linkrefid="general_fb">
                            </displayfeedback>
                        </respcondition>
                        <respcondition continue="No">
                            <conditionvar>
                                <other>
                                </other>
                            </conditionvar>
                        </respcondition>
                    </resprocessing>
                </item>
            </section>
            <section ident="group_0.1" title="fimb-basic">

                        </selection_number>
                        <selection_extension>
                            <points_per_item>
                                1

                        </selection_extension>
                    </selection>

                <item ident="ef0.1.0" title="None">

                            </mattext>
                        </material>
                        <response_lid ident="response_A">

                                <mattext>

                                </mattext>
                            </material>
                            <render_choice>

                            </material>

                            <material>
                                <mattext>

                                </mattext>
                            </material>
                            <render_choice>
                                <response_label ident="af0.1.0f3f0">

                                                <p>
                                                    4
                                                </p>
                                            </div>
                                        </mattext>
                                    </material>
                                </response_label>
                            </render_choice>
                        </response_lid>
                    </presentation>
                    <resprocessing>
                        <outcomes>
                            <decvar maxvalue="100" minvalue="0" varname="SCORE" vartype="Decimal">
                            </decvar>
                        </outcomes>
                        <respcondition continue="Yes">
                            <conditionvar>
                                <varequal respident="response_A">
                                    af0.1.0f0f0
                                </varequal>
                            </conditionvar>
                            <setvar action="Add" varname="SCORE">
                                25.0
                            </setvar>
                        </respcondition>
                        <respcondition continue="Yes">
                            <conditionvar>
                                <varequal respident="response_B">
                                    af0.1.0f1f0
                                </varequal>
                            </conditionvar>
                            <setvar action="Add" varname="SCORE">
                                25.0
                            </setvar>
                        </respcondition>
                        <respcondition continue="Yes">
                            <conditionvar>
                                <varequal respident="response_C">
                                    af0.1.0f2f0
                                </varequal>
                            </conditionvar>
                            <setvar action="Add" varname="SCORE">
                                25.0
                            </setvar>
                        </respcondition>
                        <respcondition continue="Yes">
                            <conditionvar>
                                <varequal respident="response_D">
                                    af0.1.0f3f0
                                </varequal>
                            </conditionvar>
                            <setvar action="Add" varname="SCORE">
                                25.0
                            </setvar>
                        </respcondition>
                    </resprocessing>
                </item>

                                            <div class="qg-root-block qg-block">
                                                <p>
                                                    D
                                                </p>
                                            </div>
                                        </mattext>
                                    </material>
                                </response_label>
                            </render_choice>
                        </response_lid>
                    </presentation>
                    <resprocessing>
                        <outcomes>
                            <decvar maxvalue="100" minvalue="0" varname="SCORE" vartype="Decimal">
                            </decvar>
                        </outcomes>
                        <respcondition continue="No">
                            <conditionvar>
                                <and>
                                    <varequal respident="response1">
                                        af0.3.0f0
                                    </varequal>
                                    <varequal respident="response1">
                                        af0.3.0f1
                                    </varequal>
                                    <not>
                                        <varequal respident="response1">
                                            af0.3.0f2
                                        </varequal>
                                    </not>
                                    <not>
                                        <varequal respident="response1">
                                            af0.3.0f3
                                        </varequal>
                                    </not>
                                </and>
                            </conditionvar>
                            <setvar action="Set" varname="SCORE">
                                100
                            </setvar>
                        </respcondition>
                    </resprocessing>
                </item>
            </section>

                <item ident="ef0.5.0" title="None">
                    <itemmetadata>
                        <qtimetadata>
                            <qtimetadatafield>
                                <fieldlabel>
                                    question_type
                                </fieldlabel>
                                <fieldentry>
                                </fieldentry>
                            </qtimetadatafield>
                            <qtimetadatafield>
                                <fieldlabel>
                                    points_possible
                                </fieldlabel>
                                <fieldentry>

                                </fieldentry>

                                    aff0,aff1,aff2,aff3
                                </fieldentry>
                            </qtimetadatafield>
                            <qtimetadatafield>
                                <fieldlabel>
                                    assessment_identifierref
                                </fieldlabel>
                                <fieldentry>
                                    ef0.5.0
                                </fieldentry>
                            </qtimetadatafield>
                        </qtimetadata>
                    </itemmetadata>
                    <presentation>
                        <material>
                            <mattext texttype="text/html">
                            </mattext>
                        </material>
                        <response_lid ident="response1" rcardinality="Single">
                            <render_choice>

                                            </div>

                                                </p>
                                            </div>
                                        </mattext>
                                    </material>
                                </response_label>
                            </render_choice>
                        </response_lid>
                    </presentation>
                    <resprocessing>
                        <outcomes>
                            <decvar maxvalue="100" minvalue="0" varname="SCORE" vartype="Decimal">
                            </decvar>
                        </outcomes>
                        <respcondition continue="Yes">

                                    af0.5.0f0
                                </varequal>
                            </conditionvar>

                                100
                            </setvar>
                        </respcondition>

                </item>
            </section>
